steps.t: The Captain was last seen turning south off the main road as they made their way farther into Udûn.
You should talk to the soldiers you found scrabbling among the rubble.
The rummaging soldiers can be found east of the Foothold, south of Udûn's central road. Several men were left to rummage among refuse. You should help…
The rummaging soldiers can be found east of the Foothold, south of Udûn's central road. Now that you have helped with the rummaging some, you should t…
